ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  "owner_institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization that owns the station */,
  "sensor_models" TEXT /* JSON field to store the models of sensors used at the station */,
  "sensor_calibration_dates" TEXT /* JSON field to store the calibration dates for each sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "time_now" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "wd_avg_2mins" INTEGER /* Average wind direction over the last 2 minutes */,
  "ws_avg_2mins" INTEGER /* Average wind speed over the last 2 minutes */,
  "wd_avg_10mins" INTEGER /* Average wind direction over the last 10 minutes */,
  "ws_avg_10mins" INTEGER /* Average wind speed over the last 10 minutes */,
  "wd_maxsp_this_min" INTEGER /* Maximum wind direction in the current minute */,
  "ws_maxsp_this_min" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed in the current minute */,
  "air_temp_by_box" REAL /* Air temperature measured by the box */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity */,
  "water_vapor_pressure" INTEGER /* Water vapor pressure */,
  "dew_temp" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "station_pressure" INTEGER /* Station pressure */,
  "ground_temp_pt" REAL /* Ground temperature at the surface */,
  "ground_tem_5cm" REAL /* Ground temperature at 5 cm depth */,
  "ground_tem_10cm" REAL /* Ground temperature at 10 cm depth */,
  "ground_tem_15cm" REAL /* Ground temperature at 15 cm depth */,
  "ground_tem_20cm" REAL /* Ground temperature at 20 cm depth */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version number for data points to track changes over time */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, missing) */,
  "data_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes about the data collection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Average, Maximum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the data interval (e.g., 2 minutes, 10 minutes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data interval */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the interval is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interval */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the interval was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the interval */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the data parameter (e.g., Wind Direction, Air Temperature) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data interval */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data parameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the parameter is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the parameter */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_parameters_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_parameters_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES data_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_parameters_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data reading */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data reading (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality check performed on the data reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_readings_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES data_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the file is archived */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the file is archived */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being checked */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., validation, calibration) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the check */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or results of the quality check */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the data point is flagged for further review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the operator works */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality check performed by the operator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the operator is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operators_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
